== Obtaining Shockwave ==
{{C|Shockwave||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} card, and therefore can be obtained in the following ways:
* Can be bought from the {{2|Merchant}}.
* Can be obtained from {{2|Monsters}} and {{2|Elites}} with {{R|Dingy Rug||2}}.
** Can also appear in your starting Deck in the {{2|Custom Mode|Daily Climb}} with the {{2|Custom Mode#All Star|All Star}} modifier.
* Can be obtained from {{R|Lead Paperweight||2}}.
* Can be obtained from a card reward from the {{Frame|Share Knowledge}} option at {{E|Brain Leech|2}}.
* Can be obtained from the {{Frame|Grab Something Off the Belt}} option at {{E|Endless Conveyor|2}} if Fried Eel is offered.

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
*{{BD|Vulnerable||2}} applied by this card:
** Increases damage dealt by {{C|Bully||2}}.
** Grants an additional hit from {{C|Dismantle||2}}.
** Grants additional {{BD|Strength||2}} from {{C|Dominate||2}}.
** Draws 1 (2) card via {{C|Vicious||2}}.
** Makes enemies deal 50% less damage with {{C|Colossus||2}}.
** Makes enemies take 25% (50%) more damage with {{C|Cruelty||2}}.
* {{C|Tracking||2}} makes {{BD|Weak||2}} enemies take double damage from {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}}.
* {{C|Debilitate||2}} doubles' the effect of {{BD|Vulnerable||2}} and {{BD|Weak||2}}.
====Relics====
* {{R|Paper Krane||2}} makes {{BD|Weak||2}} enemies deal 40% less damage rather than 25%.
* {{R|Paper Phrog||2}} makes {{BD|Vulnerable||2}} enemies take 25% more damage.
* {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}} can potentially double {{C|Shockwave||2}}'s {{BD|Weak||2}} ''and'' {{BD|Vulnerable||2}} application.
* {{R|Intimidating Helmet||2}} grants 4 {{KW|Block||2}} whenever this card is played.
*{{R|Charon's Ashes||2}} deals 3 damage to ALL enemies when this card is {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausted|2}}.
*{{R|Forgotten Soul||2}} deals 1 damage to a random enemy when this card is {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausted|2}}.
===Neutral===
*When attacking an enemy with 1 {{BD|Artifact||2}}, {{C|Uppercut||2}}'s {{BD|Weak||2}} will be negated, and its {{BD|Vulnerable||2}} will be applied after.
